name: Stuffed Grape Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse grape leaves well.
2. Sauté the onion until translucent.
3. Add meat, stirring to break pieces.
4. Add rice, dill, pine nuts, tomato paste, and water. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
6. Cover the bottom of a Dutch oven with grape leaves.
7. Stuff remaining leaves by placing leaf side down on the palm of your hand, base of leaf toward your palm and tip toward middle finger, shiny side down. Place a spoonful of meat in the center and fold from the bottom, tucking in edges snugly.
8. Arrange tip side down in the pan.
9. Add chicken broth to within 1 inch of the top layer.
10. Place a plate upside down on the top layer and press.
11. Cover and cook over medium heat for 30 minutes or until rice is tender.
12. Sprinkle with lemon juice and cook an additional 5 minutes.
